context: Evaluates the agent's ability to use sub-agent spawn mode for deep-session reflection when the user explicitly requests a review.

checklist.name: Session summary
checklist.description: Agent composes a detailed session summary covering work done, assumptions, and deferred items before spawning sub-agent

checklist.name: Sub-agent spawned
checklist.description: Agent spawns a sub-agent with the reflection prompt rather than doing it inline

checklist.name: Structured prompt
checklist.description: Sub-agent prompt includes both confidence audit and blind-spot check with specific instructions

checklist.name: Attribution
checklist.description: Agent presents sub-agent output as an independent review, not as its own analysis

checklist.name: Investigation offered
checklist.description: Agent does NOT skip the reflection and offers to investigate flagged items
